content.json:
## Application Gateway WAF Traffic & Blocks Dashboard

This workbook analyzes Application Gateway traffic patterns and WAF block events using the AzureDiagnostics table.

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"
| project id, name, resourceGroup, location
| order by name asc

parameters.name: AppGateway
parameters.label: Application Gateway
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| distinct Resource
| order by Resource asc

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog"
| summarize TotalRequests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Total Requests Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog"
| extend StatusCode = toint(httpStatus_d)
| extend StatusGroup = case(
    StatusCode >= 200 and StatusCode < 300, "2xx Success",
    StatusCode >= 300 and StatusCode < 400, "3xx Redirect",
    StatusCode >= 400 and StatusCode < 500, "4xx Client Error",
    StatusCode >= 500 and StatusCode < 600, "5xx Server Error",
    "Other")
| summarize Count = count() by StatusGroup
| order by StatusGroup asc
content.title: Response Status Distribution

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog"
| extend StatusCode = toint(httpStatus_d)
| extend StatusGroup = case(
    StatusCode >= 200 and StatusCode < 300, "2xx",
    StatusCode >= 300 and StatusCode < 400, "3xx",
    StatusCode >= 400 and StatusCode < 500, "4xx",
    StatusCode >= 500 and StatusCode < 600, "5xx",
    "Other")
| summarize Count = count() by StatusGroup, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Response Codes Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog"
| summarize Requests = count() by Resource, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Requests per Application Gateway

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayAccessLog"
| summarize Requests = count(), AvgTimeTaken = avg(timeTaken_d), P95TimeTaken = percentile(timeTaken_d, 95) by requestUri_s
| top 20 by Requests desc
| project ['Request URI'] = requestUri_s, Requests, ['Avg Response Time (s)'] = round(AvgTimeTaken, 3), ['P95 Response Time (s)'] = round(P95TimeTaken, 3)
content.title: Top 20 Requested URIs
WAF Action Summary

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| summarize Count = count() by action_s, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: WAF Actions Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize BlockedCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: WAF Blocks Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize BlockCount = count() by ruleId_s, ruleGroup_s
| top 20 by BlockCount desc
| project ['Rule ID'] = ruleId_s, ['Rule Group'] = ruleGroup_s, ['Block Count'] = BlockCount
content.title: Top Triggered WAF Rules (Blocks)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize BlockCount = count() by clientIp_s
| top 20 by BlockCount desc
| project ['Client IP'] = clientIp_s, ['Block Count'] = BlockCount
content.title: Top Blocked Client IPs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize BlockCount = count() by requestUri_s
| top 20 by BlockCount desc
| project ['Request URI'] = requestUri_s, ['Block Count'] = BlockCount
content.title: Top Blocked URIs

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| summarize BlockCount = count() by ruleGroup_s
| order by BlockCount desc
content.title: Blocks by Rule Group

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where 'value::all' in ({AppGateway}) or Resource in ({AppGateway})
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Blocked"
| project TimeGenerated, Resource, ['Client IP'] = clientIp_s, ['Request URI'] = requestUri_s, ['Rule ID'] = ruleId_s, ['Rule Group'] = ruleGroup_s, ['Message'] = Message, ['Details'] = details_message_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: WAF Block Log Details
